# Timeline { #natural_features.Timeline }

```python
Timeline(
    name,
    onset_s,
    offset_s,
    index=None,
    kind='intervals',
    source=None,
    metadata=dict(),
)
```

A named interval timeline used as an alignment target.

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [map_intervals](#natural_features.Timeline.map_intervals) | Map source intervals to this timeline. |

### map_intervals { #natural_features.Timeline.map_intervals }

```python
Timeline.map_intervals(onset_s, offset_s=None, *, policy='overlap')
```

Map source intervals to this timeline.
